mapper.insert: INSERT INTO approval_delegations (delegator_id, delegate_id, starts_at, ends_at, active_marker, created_at) VALUES (#{delegatorId}, #{delegateId}, #{startsAt}, #{endsAt}, #{delegatorId}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, delegator_id AS delegatorId, delegate_id AS delegateId, starts_at AS startsAt, ends_at AS endsAt, created_at AS createdAt FROM approval_delegations WHERE delegator_id = #{delegatorId} AND active_marker IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1

SELECT id, delegator_id AS delegatorId, delegate_id AS delegateId, starts_at AS startsAt, ends_at AS endsAt FROM approval_delegations WHERE delegate_id = #{delegateId} AND active_marker IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ends_at ASC
